tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild leukopenia, which may indicate a transient or chronic reduction in white blood cells. All red blood cell parameters and platelets are within normal limits, except for a markedly elevated platelet distribution width, which may suggest increased platelet size variability, possibly due to platelet activation or turnover. Clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended.
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
